CustomField.formula: IF(Contract_Period_Bookings_ACV__c < Baseline_Bookings__c ,'Baseline', IF(AND(Contract_Period_Bookings_ACV__c >= Baseline_Bookings__c,Contract_Period_Bookings_ACV__c < Tier_2_Bookings__c ),'Tier 1', IF(AND(Contract_Period_Bookings_ACV__c >= Tier_2_Bookings__c ,Contract_Period_Bookings_ACV__c < Tier_3_Bookings__c),'Tier 2', IF(Contract_Period_Bookings_ACV__c >= Tier_3_Bookings__c,'Tier 3',''))))
CustomField.label: Bookings Tier Attained
